    multimedia/mpv: enable NVDEC by default after 9db4ec993805

    $ man mpv
    [...]
    NOTE:
       Most non-copy methods only work with the OpenGL GPU backend.
       Currently, only the vaapi, nvdec and cuda methods work with
       Vulkan.

    PR:             264027
